OFFICIAL SCAM ALERT ✦ WE WILL NEVER ASK FOR PAYMENT VIA EMAIL OR TEXT MESSAGES ✦ WE WILL NEVER ASK YOU TO OPEN AN ATOMIC WALLET ✦ VERIFY ALL COMMUNICATIONS THROUGH OUR OFFICIAL WEBSITE ✦ REPORT SUSPICIOUS ACTIVITY IMMEDIATELY
New purchases are temporarily unavailable as we perform routine system maintenance to improve your experience. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your patience. All existing accounts and services will remain active and unaffected during this time. If you have any questions, please contact our support team directly at support@nordicfunder.com.
Seamless Funding and Analytics
for the Modern Trader

Program comparison table
	One-stage	Two-stage	Three-stage
Rules
Target profit	10%	P1: 10% P2: 5%	P1: 5% P2: 5% P3:5%
Max drawdown	6%	8%	5%
Drawdown type	Trailing	Static	Static
Max daily loss	5%	4%	5%
Daily loss type	EOD Balance	EOD Balance	EOD Balance

Inactivity	30 days	30 days	30 days
Refundable fee	No	No	No
Customizable rules
Profit share
Addon available to 90%	80%	80%	80%
Hold trades on weekends
Addon available to allow	Yes	Yes	Yes
Trading conditions
Leverage	20:1 leverage on Forex and Metals, 10:1 leverage on Indices, 5:1 leverage on Oil and up to 2:1 leverage on Cryptocurrencies.	20:1 leverage on Forex and Metals, 10:1 leverage on Indices, 5:1 leverage on Oil and up to 2:1 leverage on Cryptocurrencies.	20:1 leverage on Forex and Metals, 10:1 leverage on Indices, 5:1 leverage on Oil and up to 2:1 leverage on Cryptocurrencies.
EA trading (own)	Yes	Yes	Yes
Commission RT	$7/Lot FX and Metals, $0 Indices, $0 Oil, $0 Crypto	$7/Lot FX and Metals, $0 Indices, $0 Oil, $0 Crypto	$7/Lot FX and Metals, $0 Indices, $0 Oil, $0 Crypto
Spreads	Raw	Raw	Raw

DISCLAIMER

Nordic Funder is an affiliate of Forest Park FX LTD. Forest Park FX LTD offers fee-based simulated trading assessments for Potential Traders. All funding assessments are provided by Forest Park FX LTD and all assessment fees are paid
to Forest Park FX LTD. If you qualify for a Funded Account, you will be required to enter into a Trader Agreement with Forest Park FX LTD. Forest Park FX LTD does not provide any trading education or other services.

Please refer to our Terms and Conditions for additional information : https://dashboardanalytix.com/client-terms-and-policies/

© 2026 Nordic Funder | All rights reserved.
